description: Create a symmetrical kayak hull station drawing for 'Station 4' in LibreCAD using millimeters. Create three layers: 'MOLD' (White/Default) for the hull outline, 'JIG' (Cyan, Dash) for construction lines, and 'TEXT' (Yellow) for labels. On the 'MOLD' layer, draw the hull geometry symmetrical about X=0: lines from Keel (0,0) to Chine (240,120) to Sheer (290,320), mirrored on the left, and a 3-point arc for the deck camber connecting the Sheer points through the Deck Peak (0,360). On the 'JIG' layer, include a horizontal strongback line at Y=500 (length 700mm, from X=-350 to X=350) and a vertical centerline from (0,0) to (0,500). On the 'TEXT' layer, add the text 'STATION 4' (height 25mm) centered near (0,200). Save the final drawing as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/kayak_station_4.dxf.
